I'm \n[1], Elly's older brother, and I'm an adventurer together with my childhood
friend Mana.

Mana and I used to live with Elly in a village on the kingdom's frontier, but...
about a year ago, we both left the village together to pursue our dreams. Now we're
active at the adventurer's guild in the Royal City.

We've been taking on requests almost daily, saving people from monsters over and
over, and our reputation has been growing. But then... suddenly, my partner Mana said
she wanted to take a break...
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = false

\SE[2]Y-yeah...... We've been really busy with monster extermination lately, right? Maybe
because of that... my magic has been acting up...

According to the experts, it's caused by overusing magic. The strain on my body has
reached its limit, and I can't use magic properly anymore. To fix it, I need a long
period of rest...
I see... So that's what it was. ...I'm sorry for pushing you too hard.
skit loop マナ t clear

\SE[7]No...! It's not your fault, \n[1]! If anything, I'm the one holding you back... I'm the
one who should apologize.
Haha... yeah, let's stop apologizing for now...
skit expression マナ t default

Anyway, I understand the situation! Let's take a break from adventuring! Without
Mana's magic, I can't push myself recklessly either. For now, just rest up.

So, what should I do in the meantime...? We've been on quests non-stop lately. Even
if I suddenly get time off like this...

\SE[5]...Well then, \n[1], how about using this chance to go back to the village? It's been a
while since we left, and I think everyone misses us?

Now that you mention it, I'm getting lonely too... My little sister Elly, my
childhood friend Dario, the village chief who raised me... I want to see everyone
again after so long...

Alright, let's go back to the village then. When should we leave? I can go as soon as
I pack my things───

\SE[9]Ah, about that... I have to receive treatment at the guild... so I can't go~...
Sorry!

\SE[2]Yeah... I want to go back together too... I also want to meet everyone and talk to
them directly! Ugh... but it seems I have to rest quietly during treatment...

\SE[1]R-right! ...So! Enjoy the homecoming for me too! Tell everyone all about our heroic
tales~!
